name: Card
description: Surface container with optional elevation and padding.
whenToUse: Grouping related content into a distinct visual container with depth.
avoidWhen: Content doesn't need visual separation - use Stack or a plain container.

padding.description: Internal padding. true maps to 'md'. Accepts 'sm', 'md', 'lg'.

parts.name: CardHeader
parts.whenToUse: Adding a title/header area to a Card.

parts.name: CardBody
parts.whenToUse: Adding the main content area of a Card.

parts.name: CardFooter
parts.whenToUse: Adding actions or metadata at the bottom of a Card.

parts.name: CardTitle
parts.whenToUse: Adding a semantic title to a Card header.

parts.name: CardDescription
parts.whenToUse: Adding supplementary description text below a CardTitle.

parts.name: CardAction
parts.description: Action area aligned to the right in a CardHeader.
parts.whenToUse: Adding action buttons or icons to the card header, aligned to the end.

route.label: Card
route.description: Container with header, body, and footer slots

examples.title: Structured Card with Title, Description, and Action
examples.code:
Structured Card With title, description, and action components

CardTitle, CardDescription, and CardAction provide semantic structure for card headers.

examples.title: Elevation Levels
examples.code:
Default Card

Elevation level 1.

Elevated Card

Elevation 3 with header, body, footer.

examples.code:
padding="sm"

padding="md"

padding="lg"

examples.title: Size & Density
examples.code:
size="sm"

size="lg"

density="compact"

density="spacious"

examples.title: CardTitle Heading Levels
examples.code:
<sg-stack direction="vertical" gap="separate">
    <sg-card padding="md">
        <sg-card-title as="h2">H2 Section Title</sg-card-title>
    </sg-card>
    <sg-card padding="md">
        <sg-card-title as="h3">H3 Card Title (default)</sg-card-title>
    </sg-card>
    <sg-card padding="md">
        <sg-card-title as="h4">H4 Subsection Title</sg-card-title>
    </sg-card>
</sg-stack>
